Class SplashScreenManager

java.lang.Object
CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
public class SplashScreenManager extends Object
This class manages the Java 1.6 (and above) SplashScreen object.
Since:
1.00
Version:
1.02.0001, 2022-07-26
Author:
José Caetano Silva

      Default constructor. Not to be called by applications.

  • Method Details

    • clone

      public Object clone() throws CloneNotSupportedException
      Don't permit creating an object by cloning it.
      Overrides:
      clone in class Object

      CloneNotSupportedException
      Since:
      1.00

    • getInstance

      public static SplashScreenManager getInstance()
      Creates a new instance of the SplashScreenManager class.
      Returns:
      A new SplashScreenManager instance.
      Since:
      1.00

    • close

      public void close()
      Close the splash screen image.
      Since:
      1.00

    • render

      public void render(String message, int percentage)
      Draws on the splash screen text and a progress bar.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to display
      percentage - The percentage of the progress bar
      Since:
      1.00

    • setFontName

      public void setFontName(String font)
      Set the font name witch the text will be draw.
      Parameters:
      font - The font name.
      Since:
      1.00

    • setFontSize

      public void setFontSize(int size)
      Set the font point size witch the text will be draw.

      Note: 1 point = 1/72 inches.

      Parameters:
      size - The point size of the font to be used (in 1/72 of an inch units).
      Since:
      1.00

    • setFontStyle

      public void setFontStyle(int style)
      Set the font style witch the text will be draw.

      Note: Can be any of the combinations Font.PLAIN, Font.BOLD, Font.ITALIC.

      Parameters:
      style - The font stlyle to be used (Font.PLAIN, Font.BOLD, Font.ITALIC).
      Since:
      1.00
      See Also:
      • Font

    • setFontColor

      public void setFontColor(Color fontColor)
      Set the font foreground color witch the text will be draw.
      Parameters:
      fontColor - The font foreground color to be used.
      Since:
      1.00
      See Also:
      • Color

    • setFontBackground

      public void setFontBackground(Color fontBackground)
      Set the font background color witch the text will be draw.
      Parameters:
      fontBackground - The font background color to be used.
      Since:
      1.00
      See Also:
      • Color

    • setTextRectangle

      public void setTextRectangle(Rectangle textRectangle)
      Set the rectangle where the text will be draw.
      Parameters:
      textRectangle - The rectangle where the text will be draw.
      Since:
      1.00
      See Also:
      • Rectangle

    • setTextRectangle

      public void setTextRectangle(int x, int y, int with, int height)
      Set the rectangle where the text will be draw.
      Parameters:
      x - The x position of the rectangle where the text will be draw.
      y - The y position of the rectangle where the text will be draw.
      with - The with of the rectangle where the text will be draw.
      height - The height of the rectangle where the text will be draw.
      Since:
      1.00
      See Also:
      • Rectangle

    • setBarColor

      public void setBarColor(Color barColor)
      Set the progress bar foreground color witch the text will be draw.
      Parameters:
      barColor - The progress bar foreground color to be used.
      Since:
      1.00
      See Also:
      • Color

    • setBarBackground

      public void setBarBackground(Color barBackground)
      Set the progress bar background color witch the text will be draw.
      Parameters:
      barBackground - The progress bar background color to be used.
      Since:
      1.00
      See Also:
      • Color

    • setBarRectangle

      public void setBarRectangle(Rectangle textRectangle)
      Set the rectangle where the progress bar will be draw.
      Parameters:
      textRectangle - The rectangle where the text will be draw.
      Since:
      1.00
      See Also:
      • Rectangle

    • setBarRectangle

      public void setBarRectangle(int x, int y, int with, int height)
      Set the rectangle where the progress bar will be draw.
      Parameters:
      x - The x position of the rectangle where the progress bar will be draw.
      y - The y position of the rectangle where the progress bar will be draw.
      with - The with of the rectangle progress bar.
      height - The height of the rectangle progress bar.
      Since:
      1.00
      See Also:
      • Rectangle
